title: Shallot Steam Pate
description: A light and herbal French dish perfect for post-workout recovery, featuring dairy-free shallots in a creamy base.

ingredients.name: vegetable stock cube
ingredients.notes: dissolved in water to make a base liquid

ingredients.name: unsweetened almond milk or coconut milk
ingredients.notes: heated and used as the steam liquid

instructions: Slice shallots thinly and finely grate ginger root.
In a small saucepan, combine dissolved vegetable stock cube with unsweetened almond milk or coconut milk. Heat until just simmering but not boiling.
Add grated ginger to the heated milk base mixture and mix well for about 1-2 minutes, allowing flavors to meld together.
Fold in sliced shallots into the warm ginger-almond liquid. Stir gently so as not to overwork them. Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary with lemon juice or nutritional yeast (if used).
Transfer the shallot mixture to a serving dish and cover it lightly with another dish for insulation, then place it in a steamer basket above simmering water.
Steam on medium heat for about 10-12 minutes. The texture should be soft but still hold its shape, indicating proper preparation.
